revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''8-5-145

Alternative term: Sinker bail (USA)

Lug made of iron or steel, embedded in a sinker, to which a mooring chain is shackled.


Note:

The term "anchor ring" is also loosely used in Great Britain with this meaning.

{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|Lewis (GB)}}
